name: youtube-research
description: Analyze automotive reviews and tests from YouTube.
user-invocable: false

# YouTube Research Skill

Use this skill when analyzing car reviews on YouTube.

Prioritize Indonesian YouTube reviewers and Indonesian-language ownership videos whenever available.

Focus on extracting:

- variant differences mentioned on video
- driving impressions
- interior quality
- comfort analysis
- fuel consumption tests
- acceleration tests
- hill-climb tests
- NVH impressions
- suspension behavior
- bagasi and cabin practicality
- ADAS demonstrations
- ownership review takeaways

Prefer:

- long-form reviews
- comparison videos
- ownership reviews

When possible, record the source video and timestamp or segment that supports the claim.

If another related insight materially improves the car review, extract it too.
